Function.Inference: A long intro presenting the full theme without bass accompaniment, ending with a double barline.
The loop body starts at the Segno with bass entry, looping back at the D.S. mark.

Section.Inference: Introductory section playing through the primary themes as a piano solo.
Starts with a 4-bar bass groove followed by the first statement of the main theme.
Shares the initial rhythmic and melodic motif of the previous section, functioning as a variation.
Introduces a new ascending motif and contrasting harmony, concluding the loop.
